name: Greek Pasta Salad
method: Bring a big pot halfway with water and bring to the boil over medium
When the water boils, add the penne and bring it back to a boil.
Heat the pasta uncovered, mixing periodically, for 11 minutes, or until
it is heated through and still strong to the touch.
Drain well with a colander placed in the sink after rinsing with cold
Combine the vinegar, lime juice, cloves, oregano, pepper, salt, and
vegetable oil in a mixing bowl.
In a big mixing bowl, combine the spaghetti, tomatoes, onion, red and
green beans, cucumber, artichokes, and feta cheese.
Combine the spaghetti and vinaigrette in a mixing bowl.
Before serving, cover and relax for 3 hours.
